block_02: Looking for an indicator to help you determine who is in control of the market? Look no further: the Balance of Power indicator is for you.
block_04: When the indicator is above the zero line, it points to the dominance of buyers.
block_05: When the indicator is below the zero line, it shows that sellers have the upper hand.
block_06: By identifying oversold and overbought levels, you can decide when a trend reversal is more likely and take advantage of the market.
block_07: The best part? Balance of Power can be used on any time frame and asset type, including Forex, stocks, and ETFs.
